# Collect QB Meta
Collects QB points for your character on all difficulties. Tracks each "section" completion using a persistent per-character variable using Utility Belt meta expressions.

This meta should *only* attempt to acquire easily accessed QB points by talking to QB-awarding NPCs in the major towns, Fac Hub, etc.

## Requirements
- Town Network Recall Gems for each difficulty you want to run.


## Usage
- Start the meta from anywhere. It will then start running through sections that have not been previously completed on this character.
- If you have already run this before and update to a newer version, it will skip the already completed sections.
